# Hospitality Service Operations

## Guest Experience
Guest experience covers every interaction a traveler has with a brand, from booking to checkout. The quality of service, cleanliness, responsiveness, and personalization shapes perception and loyalty. Strong experiences increase repeat visits and positive word of mouth.

## Revenue Management
Revenue management optimizes pricing and inventory allocation based on demand patterns. Hotels and restaurants use forecasts, segmentation, and booking data to maximize revenue. Effective systems balance occupancy, rates, and customer satisfaction.

## Complaint Resolution
Complaint resolution turns negative experiences into opportunities for trust recovery. Fast acknowledgement, clear ownership, and fair remedies improve customer confidence. Good resolution processes also generate useful feedback for service improvement.
